verses.latin_vulgate: Psalmus ipsi David.   Ad te, Domine, clamabo ; Deus meus, ne sileas a me :  nequando taceas a me, et assimilabor descendentibus in lacum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְדָוִ֡ד אֵ֘לֶ֤יךָ יְהֹוָ֨ה ׀ אֶקְרָ֗א צוּרִי֮ אַֽל־תֶּחֱרַ֢שׁ מִ֫מֶּ֥נִּי פֶּן־תֶּחֱשֶׁ֥ה מִמֶּ֑נִּי וְ֝נִמְשַׁ֗לְתִּי עִם־י֥וֹרְדֵי בֽוֹר׃
verses.douay_rheims: A psalm for David himself. Unto thee will I cry, O Lord: O my God, be not thou silent to me: lest if thou be silent to me, I become like them that go down into the pit.
verses.finnish_biblia: Davidin Psalmi. Koska minä huudan sinua, Herra, uskallukseni, niin älä vaikene minulle; etten, koska sinä vaikenisit minulle, minä tulisi niiden kaltaiseksi, jotka hautaan menevät.
verses.king_james: Unto thee will I cry, O Lord my rock; be not silent to me: lest, if thou be silent to me, I become like them that go down into the pit.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exaudi, Domine, vocem deprecationis meæ dum oro ad te ;  dum extollo manus meas ad templum sanctum tuum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שְׁמַ֤ע ק֣וֹל תַּ֭חֲנוּנַי בְּשַׁוְּעִ֣י אֵלֶ֑יךָ בְּנׇשְׂאִ֥י יָ֝דַ֗י אֶל־דְּבִ֥יר קׇדְשֶֽׁךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Hear, O Lord, the voice of my supplication, when I pray to thee; when I lift up my hands to thy holy temple.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuule minun rukoukseni ääni, koska minä huudan sinua, kuin minä nostan käteni sinun pyhää kuorias päin.
verses.king_james: Hear the voice of my supplications, when I cry unto thee, when I lift up my hands toward thy holy oracle.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ne simul trahas me cum peccatoribus,  et cum operantibus iniquitatem ne perdas me ;  qui loquuntur pacem cum proximo suo,  mala autem in cordibus eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַל־תִּמְשְׁכֵ֣נִי עִם־רְשָׁעִים֮ וְעִם־פֹּ֢עֲלֵ֫י אָ֥וֶן דֹּבְרֵ֣י שָׁ֭לוֹם עִם־רֵעֵיהֶ֑ם וְ֝רָעָ֗ה בִּלְבָבָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Draw me not away together with the wicked; and with the workers of iniquity destroy me not: Who speak peace with their neighbour, but evils are in their hearts.
verses.finnish_biblia: Älä anna minun tulla jumalattomain ja pahointekiäin sekaan, jotka lähimmäistensä kanssa puhuvat ystävällisesti, vaan pahuutta on heidän sydämissänsä,
verses.king_james: Draw me not away with the wicked, and with the workers of iniquity, which speak peace to their neighbours, but mischief is in their hearts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Da illis secundum opera eorum,  et secundum nequitiam adinventionum ipsorum.  Secundum opera manuum eorum tribue illis ;  redde retributionem eorum ipsis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תֶּן־לָהֶ֣ם כְּפׇעֳלָם֮ וּכְרֹ֢עַ מַעַלְלֵ֫יהֶ֥ם כְּמַעֲשֵׂ֣ה יְ֭דֵיהֶם תֵּ֣ן לָהֶ֑ם הָשֵׁ֖ב גְּמוּלָ֣ם לָהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Give them according to their works, and according to the wickedness of their inventions. According to the works of their hands give thou to them: render to them their reward.
verses.finnish_biblia: Anna heille heidän työnsä jälkeen ja heidän pahan menonsa perään: anna heille heidän kättensä töiden perään, maksa heille heidän ansionsa perästä.
verses.king_james: Give them according to their deeds, and according to the wickedness of their endeavours: give them after the work of their hands; render to them their desert.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam non intellexerunt opera Domini,  et in opera manuum ejus destrues illos,  et non ædificabis eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י לֹ֪א יָבִ֡ינוּ אֶל־פְּעֻלֹּ֣ת יְ֭הֹוָה וְאֶל־מַעֲשֵׂ֣ה יָדָ֑יו יֶ֝הֶרְסֵ֗ם וְלֹ֣א יִבְנֵֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Because they have not understood the works of the Lord, and the operations of his hands: thou shalt destroy them, and shalt not build them up.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä ei he ota vaaria Herran töistä, eikä hänen käsi-aloistansa; sentähden rikkoo hän heitä ja ei rakenna heitä.
verses.king_james: Because they regard not the works of the Lord, nor the operation of his hands, he shall destroy them, and not build them up.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedictus Dominus,  quoniam exaudivit vocem deprecationis meæ.
verses.douay_rheims: Blessed be the Lord, for he hath heard the voice of my supplication.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kiitetty olkoon Herra; sillä hän on kuullut minun rukoukseni äänen.
verses.king_james: Blessed be the Lord, because he hath heard the voice of my supplications.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus adjutor meus et protector meus ;  in ipso speravit cor meum, et adjutus sum :  et refloruit caro mea,  et ex voluntate mea confitebor ei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֤ה ׀ עֻזִּ֥י וּמָגִנִּי֮ בּ֤וֹ בָטַ֥ח לִבִּ֗י וְֽנֶ֫עֱזָ֥רְתִּי וַיַּעֲלֹ֥ז לִבִּ֑י וּֽמִשִּׁירִ֥י אֲהוֹדֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord is my helper and my protector: in him hath my heart confided, and I have been helped. And my flesh hath flourished again, and with my will I will give praise to him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra on minun väkevyyteni ja kilpeni, häneen minun sydämeni toivoo, ja minä olen autettu; ja minun sydämeni riemuitsee, ja minä kiitän häntä veisullani.
verses.king_james: The Lord is my strength and my shield; my heart trusted in him, and I am helped: therefore my heart greatly rejoiceth; and with my song will I praise him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus fortitudo plebis suæ,  et protector salvationum christi sui est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֥ה עֹֽז־לָ֑מוֹ וּמָ֘ע֤וֹז יְשׁוּע֖וֹת מְשִׁיח֣וֹ הֽוּא׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord is the strength of his people, and the protector of the salvation of his anointed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra on heidän väkevyytensä; hän on väkevä, joka voideltuansa auttaa.
verses.king_james: The Lord is their strength, and he is the saving strength of his anointed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Salvum fac populum tuum, Domine, et benedic hæreditati tuæ ;  et rege eos, et extolle illos usque in æternum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הוֹשִׁ֤יעָה ׀ אֶת־עַמֶּ֗ךָ וּבָרֵ֥ךְ אֶת־נַחֲלָתֶ֑ךָ וּֽרְעֵ֥ם וְ֝נַשְּׂאֵ֗ם עַד־הָעוֹלָֽם׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Save, O Lord, thy people, and bless thy inheritance: and rule them and exalt them for ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Auta kansaas ja siunaa perimistäs, ja ravitse heitä ja korota heitä ijankaikkisesti.
verses.king_james: Save thy people, and bless thine inheritance: feed them also, and lift them up for ever.
